sources.description: Repository metadata, issue queue, discussions, PR summary, releases, labels, milestones, and contributor activity
sources.connector: GitHub CLI, GitHub API, GitHub MCP, or manual fixture

sources.description: README, quickstart, contributing guide, examples, changelog, and broken-link state
sources.connector: local markdown scan, link checker, docs build, or manual review

sources.description: Stars/forks trend, package registry signals, social mentions, support channels, and repeated user questions
sources.connector: GitHub traffic, npm/PyPI/registry API, RSS, search, forum export, or manual snapshot

notes: Keep private maintainer notes and raw moderation evidence out of committed fixtures.
Public replies and official commitments remain human gates.
